chapters.title: The Neuron: Your Starting Block
chapters.summary: Quick refresher on what a single neuron computes — weights, bias, and activation functions.

chapters.title: Building a Network
chapters.summary: How neurons connect into layers, and what happens during a forward pass through the network.

chapters.title: Loss Functions & The Chain Rule
chapters.summary: How we measure mistakes and the calculus trick that makes backpropagation possible.

chapters.title: Backpropagation Step by Step
chapters.summary: Walking through the backward pass — how error flows back through the network to update weights.

chapters.title: Gradient Descent & Training
chapters.summary: How gradients update weights, the training loop, batches, epochs — seeing the full picture.
